Notes:

I wouldn't really call this anything. I just saw a suggestion to post the RPG here instead of C.AI.
I just figured maybe I'd post something again. This should've been released months ago, though.

I don't expect anything from this, though. Evangelion bots like this on this site don't really pop off in any way.

(The intro is pretty shit anyway)

Life's good, though. ❤️
Hope to anyone who's reading this—your life is good, too.
⌬-❀❀❀-⌬
